heroHeadline: USMNT Fall 2–5 to Belgium; Six World Cup Finals on March 31
heroSubtitle: Belgium rout exposes US defensive gaps with 74 days to kickoff; Iran venue crisis unresolved; March 31 finale: Italy vs Bosnia, Sweden vs Poland, Kosovo vs Turkey, Denmark vs Czechia, Jamaica vs DR Congo, Bolivia vs Iraq — last 6 World Cup spots decided
footerNote: Data sourced from FIFA.com, UEFA.com, US Soccer, CONCACAF, ESPN, The Athletic, BBC Sport, AP, Reuters, NPR, Al Jazeera, Human Rights Watch, American Immigration Council
